title: Implement P1 workflow trust bundle

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement the open P1 workflow-trust candidates #1035, #1046, and #1050 on branch codex/implement-p1-candidates.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to ordinary startup output hardening, Planning mutation provenance preservation coverage, and routine dogfooding signal routing. Do not rewrite all ordinary outputs in this slice.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Whether a P1 item is already implemented and only needs acceptance hardening, narrow docs/contracts, tests, or planning closeout updates.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Harden tests and contracts for the three P1 issues, then run focused validation and close out the active plan honestly.

uv run agentic-workspace implement --changed <changed paths> --task "Implement P1 on a new branch" --format json
